howItWorks.intro: This blockchain validator earnings calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Net Validator Income
rules.formula: Net = (Stake x APR x Uptime) x ETH Price - Annual Costs
rules.explanation: Gross staking rewards adjusted for uptime and reduced by operating costs.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much do Ethereum validators earn?
faq.a: At current rates, a 32 ETH validator earns roughly 4-5% APR, translating to about 1.3-1.6 ETH per year before costs.

faq.q: What hardware do I need to run a validator?
faq.a: A modest setup works: 4+ core CPU, 16GB RAM, 2TB SSD, and a reliable internet connection. Total hardware cost is typically $500-$1,500.

howWeCalculate.intro: This blockchain validator earnings calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
